creator: netkernel@sdfeu.org
text:
Created attachment 195137
Serial console log including the base system configuration, and then reproducing the problem. Search for the string "pkg update", this is when the problem occurs.

Machine : Pine64 / aarch64 architecture
Cross compiled using crochet, r335557.
After successful compilation, the .img was built, and I burn it into micro SD. System gets booted, I even install several packages succesfully using pkg update. But then at some point, if I execute another pkg update, the system got crashed. I attach the full system configuration as well as how to reproduce it. Just search for "pkg update" in the attached file.
